race.comment: Good little race and again want to be with a couple, provided they both line up. HIGH ON THE HILL (6) is nommed in Sydney too but looks well placed here, coming over from Adelaide having beaten a subsequent winner last start in good time. He's got good upside and draws for a nice run midfield. CABRIOLE (8) is the danger. He's a well bred sort out of G1 winner Flit who has gone bang-bang since being gelded, winning easily at very short quotes in both runs. He's got a big turn of foot and will be up on speed. TRES MAGNIFIQUE (4) has won all three this time in over 1000m at short odds. Now to 1100m and up in the weights but warrants respect again. BRED 'EM ALL (7) has won both starts to date in Adelaide and should measure up. CHOIR POINT (11) stuck on well at Bendigo last start and should be thereabouts.
